arts.ttl: 'I was a Liverpool hero like Trent Alexander-Arnold - it's not just legacy he risks losing'
arts.sum: Michael Owen knows exactly what Trent Alexander-Arnold could be going through next year, warning his fellow Liverpool academy product that he'll be sacrificing control to join Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk makes feelings clear on new contract as Liverpool delay continues
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk will see his Liverpool contract expire at the end of the season, with little sign yet of any progress in talks over a new deal for the Reds captain

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Liverpool Keen on 'One of the Most Skilful Players on Earth'
arts.sum: Liverpool have been monitoring Lyon forward Rayan Cherki for months but are yet to make contact with the French club regarding a potential move.

arts.ttl: Playing career, Feyenoord success, Liverpool dreams | Slot talks football
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot talks Sky Sports News through his football career and Christmas traditions in this photo book special.

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Leicester City and Man City vs Everton for free on Boxing Day
arts.sum: Liverpool and Everton are among the teams playing on an action-packed Boxing Day - and you can watch their games live through Amazon Prime Video.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Leicester City: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Leicester City to Anfield looking to extend their Premier League unbeaten streak to 13 games.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer's Man Utd verdict speaks volumes as Liverpool tipped for another big win
arts.sum: Premier League legend Alan Shearer has made his predictions for the first round of festive fixtures - and he thinks that Manchester City's Pep Guardiola will get a Christmas reprieve

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Leicester City: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: The Reds are heavy favourites to maintain their lead at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares whether Ibrahima Konate will be fit to play for Liverpool vs Leicester City on Boxing Day
Leicester City predicted line-up v Liverpool as Patson Daka starts amid three changes
arts.sum: Jakub Stolarczyk and Patson Daka could be handed their first starts of the season when Leicester City head to Premier League leaders Liverpool on Boxing Day. While Hermansen’s groin injury is improving, Ruud van Nistelrooy’s uncertainty means he may not be risked at Anfield.
